title: Summoning the Courage to Face the Truth
description:
Join Helga Zepp-#LaRouche in her Weekly Live dialogue and help usher in the Year of the New Paradigm for all Humanity. Send your questions, thoughts and reports to questions@schillerinstitue.com or ask them in the live stream.

#Ukraine #Russia #China #Nato #Palestine #brics #Israel #War #nuclearwar #cruisemissile #taurus #MLK #BRI 

We are in an incredibly dangerous situation. Global NATO and echelons of the singular and collective “West” are perpetrating conflict and evil on the scale of mass suffering and death in Ukraine, and many other places, which is at the degree of genocide in Gaza.

There are voices speaking out against this, and, moreover, they are warning of the ultimate danger of nuclear war and annihilation. In the Trans-Atlantic, the battle is joined to stop this process of doom. For example, in the U.S. a letter went to President Biden on March 7, from hundreds of rabbis and cantors, calling for the U.S. to stop backing Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu. “There is no military solution” in Gaza, they wrote.

But the killing and destruction continue. Those responsible have learned nothing from the lessons of their military and insurgency “interventions,” resulting in vast destruction in Afghanistan, Iraq, Libya, Syria, Gaza, Yemen, and more. Senior journalist Simon Jenkins wrote in The Guardian on March 5, “The crass ineptitude of a quarter of a century of western military interventions should have taught us some lessons. Apparently not.” ("NATO Is Growing Restless over Ukraine, and Russia’s German Military Leak Proves It.")

What we can rely on, is that the intervention will succeed, of spreading the “Oasis Plan” approach of mutual economic development. https://laroucheorganization.com/larouche-plan-southwest-asia

The Schiller Institute today released the following invitation to its (online) international conference April 13. Register now: https://schillerinstitute.nationbuilder.com/oasis_conference_20240413
